corrections.note: Printed text has εἶδον, not ἶδον.
Printed text has ἶδαν with smooth breathing/accent as shown, not plain ιδαν? Transcript form lacks the initial vowel mark pattern used on page.
Verse number should be separated from the word; transcript has '16καὶ' but body otherwise matches. No textual correction beyond spacing needed.
Image shows ℵ and V without asterisk after ℵ for this variant.

corrections.current: καμμενη (-κεμ. ℵ*-κεεμ. ℵc) pr και ℵ
corrections.correct: τεθωρα- καμμενη (-κεμ. ℵ*-κεεμ. ℵc) pr και ℵ
corrections.note: Apparatus entry for v.7 begins with τεθωρα- at line end before καμμενη; transcript omitted the first part of the split word.
Lemma is εδιωξεν, matching the printed apparatus.

corrections.current: (incep τ ς* impro b τ εν ℵ*)
corrections.correct: (incep τ ς* improb τ εν ℵ*)
corrections.note: Printed abbreviation is improb, not impro b.
Printed siglum is ordinary c, not superscript c.

corrections.current: ωφθη... εκκυπτον] μερος τι ωφθη εκκυπτων ℵ* (πτοι ℵc.b vid V) V
corrections.correct: ωφθη... εκκυπτον] μερος τι ωφθη εκκυπτων ℵ* (πτοι ℵc.b vid V)
corrections.note: Final extra V after parenthesis is not present in print.
Printed line reads '20 ειδεν ℵV | ειδον' across the line; transcript misplaced witness assignment.

uncertain.note: Initial diacritic on ἶδαν is small; likely as printed, but body reading itself is correct apart from possible accenting style.

notes: Running head matches. Body text substantially matches page; most issues are in apparatus transcription and one omitted split word segment at a line break. Left-margin numbers 7–23 are verse numbers here, not stray line numbers.
